project.name: Doctor Opus Clinical Orchestrator
project.tagline: FHIR-native MCP + A2A clinical orchestration with contradiction-aware reasoning

mcp_server.name: Doctor Opus Clinical Superpowers
mcp_server.description: Multi-modal clinical AI tools for ECG, imaging, histology, genetics, labs, and report generation

triz_mcp_server.name: Doctor Opus TRIZ Clinical Contradiction Engine
triz_mcp_server.description: Detects and resolves clinical tradeoffs such as urgency vs diagnostic certainty

a2a_agent.name: Doctor Opus Clinical Orchestrator
a2a_agent.description: A FHIR-native clinical AI agent orchestrating MCP tools and TRIZ reasoning to return structured DiagnosticReport outputs
